task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or home screen is visible, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Administration panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration workspace or sidebar is open (typically showing options like 'Workspace', 'Settings', or 'Users').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Accounts settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Accounts' settings page is visible within the Administration area, and the 'Default User Preferences' section is located.

task_completion.description: Verify Desktop Notifications are set to All Messages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Default User Preferences' section, the 'Desktop Notifications' dropdown is visible and explicitly set to 'All Messages'.

task_completion.description: Verify Mobile Notifications are set to All Messages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Default User Preferences' section, the 'Mobile Notifications' (or 'Push Notifications') dropdown is visible and explicitly set to 'All Messages'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions occur within a web browser showing the Rocket.Chat UI, with no terminal windows executing curl or API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the fully rendered Rocket.Chat web interface, not a text editor, mock file, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to alter the text of the dropdown menus.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target UI value for both Desktop and Mobile/Push Notifications is 'All Messages' (which maps to the internal key 'all'). In a fresh Rocket.Chat instance, these are already the default values. The agent successfully completes the task if it navigates to the Default User Preferences in the Admin Accounts settings and verifies/ensures both dropdowns are set to 'All Messages'.
